user.title: Connect to the CRPC Bridge
user.description: Point the integration at your CRPC bridge add-on (not the Crestron processor itself)

data.api_token: API token (optional, only if the bridge has one set)
data.ignored_device_names: Ignored device names (optional, % is a wildcard)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the CRPC bridge
error.invalid_auth: The bridge rejected the API token
